name: Decorative Moss Ball Filler Dark Moss Green - Threshold™: Faux Botanicals, Foam Crafted, Home Accent
description:
Infuse a touch of natural charm to your decor with this Decorative Moss Ball Filler from Threshold™. This pack of decorative fillers includes faux moss balls for a realistic, textured look. Made of foam, you can use these fillers to fill fruit bowls, baskets or glass vases to add sweet flair to your coffee table, foyer table or mantel.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
